name: Bestec Power Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Bestec Power Electronics Co., Ltd. designs, fabricates, markets, and sells switching power supply products worldwide. It provides LED drivers, adapters, open frames, and server/IPC products under the Bestec brand for lighting, medical, ITE, NB and PC, networking, and industrial applications. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
